### Reconciliation

A comment that merely says judge-rulings in prose, like this sentence
quoting the `<!-- judge-rulings` convention mid-paragraph, must never be
treated as the real block by any reader.

<!-- judge-rulings
- id: G1
  stable_finding_key: gh-5009741498-7cbd4498
  judge_ruling: sustained
  judge_confidence: high
  points_awarded: P+1
- id: G2
  stable_finding_key: gh-5009741498-68e64a03
  judge_ruling: sustained
  judge_confidence: high
  points_awarded: P+1
-->

Trailer text after the block, untouched by any splice.
